1f3eef73-6e06-48fa-8db0-854233642b0f.Text: The Master Tactician suffers {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} equal to 10% of their {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}, gains twice the Master Tactician's {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} stacks of tactical advantage, and resets the {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g} of Linchpin, Inspire, and Strongpoint. Until the end of the Master Tactician's turn, these abilities can only target the Master Tactician themselves and their attacks will not expend MP. They will also gain a damage bonus equal to 25% of the current momentum. The Master Tactician will gain +2 AP,+{uip|MoveBonus|305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6} MP, and can make an extra attack this turn.

2c980c71-a981-4e79-bcab-ba5108749ee6.Text: At the beginning of the Master Tactician's turn, if their {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g} is higher than 100, the first {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}burst{/g} attack or {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area attack{/g} used by the Master Tactician this turn costs −1 less {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}action point{/g} (minimum 0).

8644abbf-d4fd-46ee-9564-22566f2d15cb.Text:
The target ally or the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerTacticianGlossary}Master Tactician{/g} gains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} for every 5 stacks of {g|f:b669fe2c03a240fca1b3b2429ca87414}tactical advantage{/g} the Master Tactician has, but the Master Tactician loses half of their stacks of {g|f:b669fe2c03a240fca1b3b2429ca87414}tactical advantage{/g} (rounded up). This effect stacks and lasts until the end of combat. They will also gain +3% hit chance, dodge chance, and damage reduction for every 3 stacks of the Linchpin effect. 
Until the beginning of the Master Tactician's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the Master Tactician gains stacks of {g|f:b669fe2c03a240fca1b3b2429ca87414}tactical advantage{/g} equal to {uip|AdditionalMomentum|ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}% of all {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g} the target gains (instead of the usual 20%).

02eb8892-330a-4cdd-974c-49dd74875bc8.Text:
Can only be used on enemies with the unfinished business effect. This effect is applied to enemies which were attacked by the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerTacticianGlossary}Master Tactician{/g} or their allies and have less than 50% of their {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g} remaining.
The Master Tactician immediately attacks the target with a {g|Encyclopedia:SingleRangedAttacksGlossary}single shot{/g} or strike. This attack does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attacks per turn{/g} limit, dealing half of the weapon's maximum damage and an additional +{unit_stat|WarhammerBallisticSkill|bonus} damage.

da53b422-cdef-4662-9130-c9ea1856c8d1.Text: The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerTacticianGlossary}Master Tactician{/g} deals +20% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} to targets with less than 50% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} and heals +25% more wounds for targets with less than 50% wounds.
